Overrides.Override: 6% reduced Effect of Curses on you
Spells have Added Spell Damage equal to 30% of Physical Damage of your Equipped Two handed Weapon Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Spellbound
6% reduced Effect of Curses on you
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp
